question: Set 1 Winner: Hanfmann vs Svajda
description:
This market refers to the tennis match between Yannick Hanfmann and Zachary Svajda in the Australian Open ATP, scheduled for January 18 2026.
This market will resolve to “Hanfmann” if Yannick Hanfmann wins the first set. It will resolve to “Svajda” if Zachary Svajda wins the first set.
If the match begins but is not completed, and the first set is concluded with a winner determined, this market will resolve based on that completed set. If the first set is not completed for any reason, this market will resolve 50-50.
If the match is canceled (not played at all) or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without play beginning, this market will resolve 50-50.
Resolution will be based on official Grand Slam match statistics.

This market refers on the tennis match between Hubert Hurkacz and Zizou Bergs in the Australian Open ATP, scheduled for January 17 at 7:00PM ET.

This market will resolve to 'Hurkacz' if Hubert Hurkacz advances against Zizou Bergs.

This market will resolve to 'Bergs' if Zizou Bergs advances against Hubert Hurkacz.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If the match begins but is not completed, and one player advances due to the opponent's retirement, default, or disqualification, this market will resolve to the player who advances.

If the match ends in a walkover (player withdraws before the start and the other advances automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50.

The primary resolution source will be official information from the Australian Open. A consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

This market refers to the tennis match between Priscilla Hon and Marina Stakusic in the Australian Open WTA, scheduled for January 18 2026.
This market will resolve to "Over" if the total number of games completed across all sets equals or exceeds 22. Otherwise, it will resolve to "Under."
All tiebreaks—including any Champions/Super tiebreak—count as one (1) game toward the total.
If the match begins but is not completed, this market will resolve 50-50. If the match is canceled before play begins or delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a result, this market will also resolve 50-50.
Resolution will be based on official Grand Slam statistics.

events.title: Australian Open Women's: Priscilla Hon vs Marina Stakusic
events.description:
This market refers on the tennis match between Priscilla Hon and Marina Stakusic in the Australian Open WTA, scheduled for January 17 at 7:00PM ET.

This market will resolve to 'Hon' if Priscilla Hon advances against Marina Stakusic.

This market will resolve to 'Stakusic' if Marina Stakusic advances against Priscilla Hon.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50.

If the match begins but is not completed, and one player advances due to the opponent's retirement, default, or disqualification, this market will resolve to the player who advances.

If the match ends in a walkover (player withdraws before the start and the other advances automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50.

The primary resolution source will be official information from the Australian Open. A consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

This market refers to the tennis match between Adrian Mannarino and Rinky Hijikata in the Australian Open ATP, scheduled for January 18 2026.
This market will resolve to “Mannarino” if Adrian Mannarino wins the first set. It will resolve to “Hijikata” if Rinky Hijikata wins the first set.
If the match begins but is not completed, and the first set is concluded with a winner determined, this market will resolve based on that completed set. If the first set is not completed for any reason, this market will resolve 50-50.
If the match is canceled (not played at all) or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without play beginning, this market will resolve 50-50.
Resolution will be based on official Grand Slam match statistics.

This market refers to the tennis match between Suzan Lamens and Anastasia Potapova in the Australian Open WTA, scheduled for January 18 2026.
This market will resolve to "Over" if the total number of games completed in the first set equals or exceeds 11. Otherwise, it will resolve to "Under."
Any first-set tiebreak counts as one (1) game toward the total.
If the first set is not completed for any reason, this market will resolve 50-50. If the match is canceled before play begins, or delayed beyond 7 days without commencement, this market will also resolve 50-50.
Resolution will be based on official Grand Slam results.
